description.ko: 투명한 유리 결정을 통해 백색광이 찬란한 무지개 스펙트럼으로 분산되는 찰나의 에너지.
description.en: A study of light refraction and energy, showing pure white light breaking into a vivid rainbow spectrum through glass.

prompt: A hyper-realistic macro photography shot of PRISM-2, titled 'The Chromatic Dispersion.' A multi-faceted crystalline structure captures a single white light beam, shattering it into an ultra-wide spectrum of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Background is minimalist matte black, making rainbow caustics glow with pure energy. 8k resolution, ray-traced refraction, emphasizing internal light paths and glass clarity.
